2383800.name: Monopoly Madness Demo
2383800.description:
Play MONOPOLY® Madness for free with our demo! Alone or with your friends, engage in a frantic real-time competitive race to see who has what it takes to take Mr. Monopoly’s place!

Collect resources, buy and upgrade properties, mess with your opponents, and avoid their tricks to win the race for riches.

The rules of the game have changed slightly:
• No more board! Roam the streets of Monopoly City to collect money, water, and electricity.
• 20 NEW playable characters inspired by classic MONOPOLY tokens.
• Discover 4 unique environments, each with several levels and layouts.
• Play with up to 6 players online or locally.
• Get power-ups from the Community Chests! Use them to mess with your opponents and gain an advantage to win.
2383800.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 日语*, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
